name: idris-counters
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man at table, eyes locked across room. Jaw set, conviction visible. Behind him: warm amber room, couch edge visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: Walking away doesn't fix the system. It just hands victory to the people who want it broken.

name: the-strike
prompt: Close-up, tight on face. Dark-haired man speaking forcefully. Dark eyes hard. Heavy crosshatching pressure lines behind. | anime manga, cel shading, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: Abandoning them isn't principle. It's cowardice dressed as conviction.
